{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Archlord Forger
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Archlord]] [[Forger technique]] launches multiple arrows at once.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
